_comment: Synthetic Sobre C declared values for CTTI-2026-44. All figures are fictional.

_criteria.price_eur: 2.1 Valoració econòmica — total bid price in EUR
_criteria.ans_improvement_hours: 2.2 Increment de nivell d'ANS — additional uptime SLA minutes per month above the 99.95% minimum
_criteria.manufacturer_services_days: 2.3 Serveis professionals de fabricant — hyperscaler professional services days included
_criteria.training_days: 2.4 Formació de la solució implantada — days of technical training provided to CTTI staff
_criteria.pue_value: 2.5 Eficiència energètica (PUE) — Power Usage Effectiveness of the proposed infrastructure
_criteria.rto_guaranteed_hours: 2.6 RTO garantit per servei crític — guaranteed Recovery Time Objective for CRITICAL tier services in hours
